name: Suspicious Windows ANONYMOUS LOGON Local Account Created
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: James Pemberton / @4A616D6573
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Windows ANONYMOUS LOGON Local Account Created
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of suspicious accounts similar to ANONYMOUS LOGON, such as using additional spaces. Created as an covering detection for exclusion of Logon Type 3 from ANONYMOUS LOGON accounts.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4720 AND (LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE '%anonymous%' AND LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE '%logon%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Windows ANONYMOUS LOGON Local Account Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4720 AND (LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE '%anonymous%' AND LOWER("SAM Account Name") LIKE '%logon%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Windows ANONYMOUS LOGON Local Account Created
